plugins.name: branding
plugins.description: Core branding, design system, color tokens, typography, and output configuration. Required by all other plugins.

plugins.name: document-generation
plugins.description: Generate branded PDF and DOCX documents — reports, memos, proposals, form-filled PDFs.

plugins.name: presentation-generation
plugins.description: Generate branded PPTX slide decks — executive summaries, pitch decks, quarterly reviews.

plugins.name: spreadsheet-generation
plugins.description: Generate XLSX spreadsheets with live formulas and CSV data exports.

plugins.name: text-generation
plugins.description: Generate Markdown reports, self-contained HTML pages, plain-text summaries, and structured JSON data files.

plugins.name: apps-generation
plugins.description: Generate self-contained React dashboards, reports, comparisons, and timelines using shadcn/ui.
